reasoning: The chart configuration fails to answer the core part of the business question ('Wieviel Umsatz...'), which asks for the total revenue per year (or a detailed analysis based on total earnings). The provided chart displays monthly revenue figures overlaid for all years without aggregation. This makes it impossible to directly read the annual totals required by the question. Furthermore, plotting four years of monthly data as grouped bars on a single x-axis (months) creates significant visual clutter and overlap, making comparison difficult. A bar chart with Years on the X-axis and Total Revenue on the Y-axis would be the correct approach.
suggested_improvement: Aggregate the data by summing '[Umsatz SD/CO]' for each 'Kalender[Jahr]' and create a simple bar chart where the X-axis represents the Years (2021-2024) and the Y-axis represents the Total Revenue.
